name: oatpad
description: Read your oatpad meeting-note sessions: list them, fetch one by id, or pull every session in a date range.
long_description: Reads `.oats` session files written by the oatpad macOS app from its application data directory and exposes them as MCP tools. Read-only — the bundle never writes back to disk.

tools.name: list_sessions
tools.description: List every oatpad meeting-note session, newest first.

tools.name: get_session
tools.description: Retrieve a single oatpad session by id.

tools.name: get_sessions_in_range
tools.description: Retrieve every oatpad session whose createdAt falls within an ISO 8601 datetime range.
